reference: My eleven-year-old daughter has been experiencing a low-grade fever for the last three months. She suffered from viral hepatitis, for which she has received complete treatment as the doctor indicated. The doctor suspected typhoid and she completed a full course of antibiotics, but there has still been no improvement. Please help.
text: My eleven-year-old daughter has been experiencing a low-grade fever for the last three months. She suffered from viral hepatitis for which she has received complete treatment as the doctor indicated. The doctor suspected typhoid, and she completed a full course of antibiotics. But there has still been no improvement. Please help.
